consistency.notes: The description clearly outlines the mechanics: charge usage, range, save DC (15), and daily recharge (1d6+1). The provided table details 100 distinct outcomes, adhering to the d100 roll specification.

quality.notes: The data is well-structured and detailed, capturing all critical mechanical aspects of the magic item, including specific triggers for creature vs. point targeting and the destruction mechanic on the last charge.

charge_system.destruction_trigger: Roll d20 on last charge expenditure; 1 causes destruction.

spell_casting.range_adjustment: Range becomes 120 feet if not already, for spells cast from the wand.

effect_specificity.general_rules: Rules are provided for centering area effects and random determination of subjects when multiple options exist.
effect_specificity.table_coverage: The d100 table covers outcomes from 01 to 00 (implying 100 outcomes), with effects ranging from minor alterations (blue skin) to powerful spells (fireball) and high-stakes save-or-suck effects (petrification).

specific_mechanic_check.entry_11_15: Self-inflicted stun with flavor text ('believing something awesome just happened') is mechanically sound.
specific_mechanic_check.entry_98_00: The save-or-die/restrain mechanic (DC 15 CON save) is well-defined, including the escalation from restrained to petrified.

data_integrity.source_metadata_check: The source metadata confirms rarity ('Rare') and attunement requirement, consistent with the main description.
